Übung macht den Meister


https://t.me/joinchat/AAAAAEHo8zzuFCBQ5GxPmA

by the way I ahoudk probably say something about myself...
I'm still finishing my undergraduate degree. I'm one of the early DSE takers and at that time I only got a 5 in English.
One year later, having had a lot of chatting with foreigners in English, I got a 7.5 in IELTS (8.5 in listening and 8 in reading to be specific, but still I was pretty bad at speaking)
Now I'll probably get higher that... I mean, whenever I look back at how I speak and write during that time, I'm always a bit ashamed
And I am a lot more confident in my English speaking now. Practically speaking, I speak English more than Chinese nowadays.

anyways, moral of the story: keep on practising and you'll get better and better
